title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Lodha Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Lodha Group
jsonLd.description:
We at Lodha Group are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Lodha Group:
Lodha Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
